turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello, may I speak with [CONSUMER_NAME]?

turns.speaker: third_party
turns.text: He's not here right now. Can I take a message?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Oh, sure. Who am I speaking with?

turns.speaker: third_party
turns.text: This is [THIRD_PARTY_NAME]. I'm his roommate.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks, [THIRD_PARTY_NAME]. And you guys share the apartment at [STREET_ADDRESS]?

turns.speaker: third_party
turns.text: Uh, yeah. Why?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Just confirming. Do you happen to know when [CONSUMER_NAME] might be available?

turns.speaker: third_party
turns.text: Not really. He's at work until pretty late. Is it important?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yeah, it's pretty important. I've been trying to reach him for a couple of days now.

turns.speaker: third_party
turns.text: Well he's been busy. Is there something I can help with?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I appreciate that, but it's a private financial matter. I did leave a voicemail on his cell earlier though — said this is about his [CREDITOR_NAME] credit card debt of twenty-four hundred dollars and that he needs to call back today.

turns.speaker: third_party
turns.text: Wait, what? You told me it's about his debt?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: [pause] Uh... I mean, it's a financial matter. If you could just have him call me back at [PHONE_NUMBER], that would be great. Ask for [AGENT_NAME].

turns.speaker: third_party
turns.text: Yeah, but you just said he owes twenty-four hundred dollars. I don't think you're supposed to tell me that.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: It's not a big deal. You're his roommate, right? You probably see his mail anyway. The account is ninety days past due and we really need to hear from him today.

turns.speaker: third_party
turns.text: That doesn't mean I need to know his business. What's your name again?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: [AGENT_NAME]. And if he can't call today, tell him we're prepared to escalate this to our legal department. It's account number [ACCOUNT_NUMBER].

turns.speaker: third_party
turns.text: Okay, I'm gonna write this down, but this feels really wrong. You shouldn't be telling me all this.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm just doing my job, [THIRD_PARTY_NAME]. Please make sure he calls today. Thanks for your help.

turns.speaker: third_party
turns.text: Yeah. Bye.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Goodbye.

turns.speaker: system
turns.text: [cough]

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: [muttered] Roommates.
